name: recoil_app_initialize_display
description: RecoilApp::InitializeDisplay opens the selected video mode, initializes software span occlusion when needed, binds renderer framebuffer state, clears/presents startup buffers, and returns success or failure.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT COFF byte compare fails with 144 unmasked mismatches after masking 108 relocation bytes; the function is a broad runtime setup sequence with provider calls and indirect CRT import paths still pending a class/subsystem binary-safe pass.

The native smoke covers the early video-open failure path. The full success path requires the real video provider because zVideo::InitVideoSystem binds DirectDraw dispatch internally; direct display/raster/clear callees on that path are separately functionally accepted.
